'''Pytor Tuko''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] militia officer and [[Musician/Legends|musician]]. Sometime following [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], he was the leader of the [[Battling 166th Troubadours]], a militia band based in [[Bela Vistal/Legends|Bela Vistal]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TempArtisan.jpg|250px|thumb|Possible depictions of Pytor Tuko]]
Pytor Tuko was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]]. The game was shut down on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. Due to the nature of many older quests in ''Star Wars Galaxies'', the [[Species/Legends|species]] and appearance of Pytor Tuko changed each time a player performed this quest. Therefore, it is impossible to verify the canonical species of Tuko. However, the quest dialogue given by Muse indicated that Pytor Tuko was a [[Gender/Legends|male]]. Although not mentioned in the quest dialogue, examining Tuko consistently identified him as an artisan.
